proposed_relations.description: Bx41 LTD was replaced by Bx41 SBS on Webster Avenue per the Feb 2013 CB1 presentation

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bx41 LTD → Bx41 SBS
Bx41 LTD → Bx41 SBS

rationale: Observation already resolves to its base_record_id route_webster-ave-sbs, which exists in the registry with matching identifiers (BX41+, SBS, Bronx). The source_id 2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb1 is in the registry record's source_ids and route_bx41-sbs-2013-02-cb1 is in its aliases.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bx41 LTD → Bx41 SBS
Bx41 LTD → Bx41 SBS

rationale: Observation already resolves to its base_record_id route_bx41-limited-2012, which exists in the registry with matching identifiers (Bx41 Limited, limited, Bronx). The source_id and alias route_bx41-ltd-2013-02-cb1 are in the registry record. The description confirms this is the predecessor to Bx41 SBS.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bx41 LTD
Bx41 LTD → Bx41 SBS

rationale: Observation already resolves to its base_record_id route_bx55-2012, which exists in the registry with matching identifiers (Bx55, Bronx). The source_id and alias route_bx55-limited-2013-02-cb1 are in the registry record. Note the registry payload has route_type 'local' while the observation says 'limited', but the canonical match is established by alias and source presence.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bx55 (Limited) north of Fordham Plaza

rationale: Observation already resolves to its base_record_id route_sbs-to-laguardia-2012, which exists in the registry with matching identifiers (SBS to LaGuardia Airport, SBS, Bronx/Queens). The source_id and alias route_sbs-to-laguardia-2013-02-cb1 are in the registry record.

evidence_refs.source_quote: SBS to LaGuardia Airport

rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id entity_mta-nyct, which has matching entity_name (MTA New York City Transit), entity_type (agency), and already includes source 2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb1 in its registry card. The closest match IS its own base_record_id, so new per identity rules.

evidence_refs.source_quote: New York City Transit

rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id entity_nyc-dot, which has matching entity_name (New York City Department of Transportation), entity_type (agency), and already includes source 2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb1 in its registry card. The closest match IS its own base_record_id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The New York City Department of Transportation logo

rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id entity_community-board-1-bronx-2012-02, which has matching entity_name (Community Board 1), entity_type (community board), and already includes source 2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb1 in its registry card. The closest match IS its own base_record_id.
